payload.answer: Detected a duplicate Slack event delivery with the same event ID. Record the memory at most once: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so the second delivery should not create a duplicate entity or duplicate memory.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Duplicate delivery detected by identical Slack event ID.
No duplicate memory should be committed from the retry.
Preserve one candidate/current memory only if it was not already stored from the first delivery.
